source.title: PDD Holdings Valuation and Comparable Multiples Analysis

extractions.claim: PDD trades at extreme discount to all global e-commerce peers: Forward P/E 8-9x vs BABA 19.6x, Coupang 60-71x, Sea Limited 34x, industry median ~15-20x
extractions.evidence: PDD: Forward P/E 8.44x, trailing P/E 10.53x. BABA forward P/E 19.57x. Coupang trailing P/E 82.72x, forward P/E 60-71x. Sea Limited ~34x forward P/E. PDD EV/EBITDA 5.30-6.63 vs industry median 9.37-10.44. Coupang EV/EBITDA 38.8x. Amazon EV/EBITDA ~22.5x.

verification.verifier_notes: PDD multiples from StockAnalysis, GuruFocus. Peer multiples from respective sources. All as of early 2026.

extractions.claim: PDD's EV/FCF of 5.37 implies the market expects earnings to decline — yet analyst consensus is for return to double-digit earnings growth from 2026
extractions.evidence: EV/FCF ratio 5.37. Earnings growth forecast at 0.13% for 2025, but return to double-digit earnings growth anticipated from 2026 onwards. Revenue CAGR 2024-2027E is 12%. Analyst consensus: 7 Buys, 4 Holds, average target $124-127. Loop Capital target $170. Stock trading $90-110, down ~15% YTD.

verification.verifier_notes: Valuation ratios from multiple financial data providers. Analyst targets from Seeking Alpha, FinViz.

extractions.claim: Smart money accumulating: Dodge & Cox, Hillhouse (HHLR), David Tepper's Appaloosa significantly increased PDD positions in late 2025, signaling value floor
extractions.evidence: Dodge & Cox and Hillhouse (HHLR) significantly increased positions in late 2025. PDD is one of billionaire David Tepper's top stock picks heading into 2026. Baillie Gifford holds ~2.4%. Institutional ownership ~28.4%. DCF valuation suggests 42% upside ($200.99 vs $116.79 market price).

verification.verifier_notes: Institutional buying from Seeking Alpha and 13F filings analysis. David Tepper pick from financial media.

extractions.claim: Adjusting for net cash (~$60B), PDD's operating business trades at roughly 1-2x operating earnings — an absurdly cheap multiple for a 25%+ margin platform business
extractions.evidence: Market cap ~$80B. Net cash ~$60B. Implied operating business value ~$20B. Operating income TTM ~$12-13B. This implies ~1.5-2x operating earnings for the core business. For comparison, Coupang trades at 38x EV/EBITDA and Sea Limited at ~34x P/E. Even Alibaba, widely considered cheap, trades at ~20x forward earnings.

verification.verifier_notes: Back-of-envelope calculation using publicly available data. The exact calculation depends on how you treat merchant deposits, restricted cash, and other balance sheet items. Directionally correct but simplified.
